calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Adrian Colley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Nancy Murphy.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ricki Love is present.
Attorney Robert Schoen appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of FEB-29-2016 is vacated. (JPT/501)
